rules.name: repeated_context
rules.pattern: \b(?:As we discussed earlier|As mentioned before|As previously stated|As I said before)\b[,.]?\s*

rules.name: repeated_question
rules.pattern: \b(?:Same question as before|I asked this earlier|This is the same question)\b[,.]?\s*

rules.name: reestablished_context
rules.pattern: \b(?:Going back to the code above|Referring back to|Returning to)\b\s*

rules.name: summary_replacement
rules.pattern: \b(?:To summarize what we've discussed|In summary of our conversation|To recap)\b[,.]?\s*
